So to kick us off, I know that some of us on today's call may not be aware of what apartment IQ is.
So I figured we'd start there defining apartment IQ what it is and what it can do.
So apartment IQ is a data analytic tool that automates the market survey process for your teams, which ultimately we're hoping will save you a lot of time and really help to optimize your revenue.
Potential part I Q's data is collected from 100% public sources.

So unlike some tools on the market where you have to share your data and then have data shared with you, the data that we're collecting is 100% publicly sourced and it's updated every 24 hours without human error.
So you can really expect to see data that's really the most relevant and up to date in your market.

So instead of having to spend hours, uh having your team collect the data validate it, share it, they can really focus on analyzing market insights and understanding how they compare to competitive properties in their area.
In addition, Apartment IQ offers the most robust coverage in the market today.
So we're able to track most competitive properties in the market as long as they have live leasing and a website.
Uh we need to be able to see unit level pricing and a website in order to track that data in apartment IQ.
Harman IQ also offers 100% unlimited user access.

So this really allows your team to have the flexibility uh to ensure that everybody from on site teams such as property management, assistant, property managers, leasing specialists all the way up to your ownership groups will really feel empowered to make decisions, leveraging the data here in apartment IQ.
So after today's call, we're hoping that you'll walk away, feeling uh excited about the tool, ready to dive in and uh roll this out to your teams.
And then we really hope ultimately again, that this will save you a lot of time.
Uh So that you can all be on the same page when it comes to the data pertaining to your properties.
